articles.author: Edward-Isaac Dovere
articles.title: Gavin Newsom opposes a California wealth tax. He’s proposing a national billionaire tax instead - CNN
articles.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom on Friday proposed a national tax on billionaires that he says is the first part of an “economic reset for America” agenda, which aides explicitly say is part of his considering to launch a presidential campaign.
